description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .test_template with a script running two Julia commands: `julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.clone(pwd()); Pkg.build("MyPackage"); Pkg.test("MyPackage", coverage = true)'` and `julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.add("Coverage"); import MyPackage; cd(joinpath(dirname(pathof(MyPackage)), "..")); using Coverage; cl, tl = get_summary(process_folder()); println("(", cl/tl*100, "% ) covered")'`. Add a `test:0.7` job using the `julia:0.7` image that executes the template script, and a `test:1.0` job using the `julia:1.0` image that also executes the same script. Add a `pages` job in the `deploy` stage that runs only on the `master` branch, uses the `julia:0.7` image, runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y git`, then `julia -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.clone(pwd()); Pkg.build("MyPackage");'`, then `julia -e 'using Pkg; import MyPackage; Pkg.add("Documenter")'`, then `julia --color=yes docs/make.jl`, moves the generated site with `mv docs/build public`, and publishes the `public` directory as an artifact.
